summary: Mobile UI/UX overhaul testing completed successfully. All requested features verified on iPhone 14 viewport (393x852): single-column layouts, K/M/B number formatting, compact signal display, Merin button (not iframe) on mobile, Trade History card layout, and mobile-optimized controls.
critical_code_review_comments: formatCompact() function correctly implements K/M/B formatting for mobile (lines 55-65 in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx)
Mobile signal card properly shows BUY/SELL indicator, product, time, and 'Trade Now' button (lines 1377-1412)
Summary cards use grid-cols-1 on mobile for single-column layout (line 1415)
Merin iframe hidden on mobile with lg:hidden class, mobile button shown with lg:hidden fixed bottom (lines 2019, 2060)
Trade History uses md:hidden for mobile card layout and hidden md:block for desktop table (lines 1702-1735)
Countdown timer has mobile-friendly sizing with responsive text classes (md:text-4xl vs text-2xl)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile UI/UX overhaul verified. All features working: 1) ProfitTrackerPage - single-column layout, K/M/B formatting ($19.33K, +$6.63K), compact signal card with Trade Now button. 2) TradeMonitorPage - single-column layout, Merin iframe hidden (button shown instead), Trade History card layout (not table), countdown timer mobile sizing, Your Time and Today's Summary cards readable.
